# Architecture Decision Records

This directory contains the Architecture Decision Records (ADRs) for tox-ansible.

<!-- AUTO-GENERATED by scripts/generate_adr_index.py — do not edit manually -->

## Implemented

Decisions that are fully reflected in the codebase.

| ADR | Title | Date |
|-----|-------|------|
| [ADR-001](ADR-001-downstream-matrix-extends-upstream.md) | Downstream Matrix Extends Upstream | 2026-07-13 |

## Creating New ADRs

1. Copy the template from `../templates/adr.md`
2. Use the next available number (currently ADR-002)
3. Include:
   - Status (Proposed → Accepted → Implemented)
   - Date
   - Context
   - Alternatives Considered
   - Decision
   - Consequences (positive/negative)
   - Implementation Notes
   - Related Decisions
   - References
   - Revision History
